# Scrubby — Email Validation for Risky & Catch-All Emails

> For full product documentation see: https://scrubby.io/llms-full.txt

## What it does
Scrubby validates catch-all and risky emails that standard SMTP verification tools cannot resolve. Using deep inbox-level testing over 48-72 hours, Scrubby gives definitive valid/invalid results with 98.7% accuracy, recovering up to 42% more usable leads from your email lists.

## Key Features
- Risky/Catch-All Email Validation — validates emails that ZeroBounce, NeverBounce, and similar tools mark as "Accept-All" or "Risky"
- Bulk Email List Cleaning — upload CSV lists for batch processing
- Blacklist Monitor — monitor domains and IPs against 100+ blacklists
- Email Testing — test deliverability, spam scores, and inbox placement
- API & Integrations — REST API plus integrations with Clay, Zapier, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Instantly, SmartLead

## How it works
1. Run your list through any SMTP verification tool (ZeroBounce, NeverBounce, MillionVerifier, etc.)
2. Export the "Risky" / "Catch-All" / "Accept-All" segment
3. Upload that segment to Scrubby
4. Scrubby performs inbox-level validation over 48-72 hours
5. Get definitive Valid / Invalid results — no more grey area

## Pricing
- Free: 100 validation credits (no credit card required)
- Starter: $27/mo — 1,000 credits
- Basic: $127/mo — 5,000 credits
- Growth: $247/mo — 10,000 credits
- Enterprise: Custom pricing — contact sales

## Integrations
Clay, Zapier, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Mailchimp, Instantly, SmartLead, ZeroBounce, NeverBounce, MillionVerifier, BriteVerify, Bouncer, Debounce, Hunter.io

## Company
- Founded: 2020
- Founders: Erik Paulson, Anirudh Kaushal
- HQ: Tallinn, Estonia (with teams in India and US)
- G2 Rating: 4.85/5 (120+ reviews)
- GDPR Compliant
